title: Sophronitis tereticaulis
taxonomy: Sophronitis tereticaulis is a species of orchid. It is classified as a terrestrial orchid, native to the Americas. The classification of Sophronitis tereticaulis is further grouped into the family Orchidaceae and genus Sophronitis. However, it has been reclassified under the genus Brachystele. The species is now commonly referred to as Brachystele tereticaulis.
